editions.name: The White Edition
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull White Edition with the taste of exotic Coconut and juicy Blueberry

editions.name: The Blue Edition
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Blue Edition with the tempting fruity taste of Juneberry
editions.alt_text: Red Bull The Sea Blue Edition - Image

editions.name: The Spring Edition
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Spring Edition combines the taste of Cherry with notes of almond and Cherry Blossom

editions.name: Energy Drink
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Energy Drink is appreciated worldwide by top athletes, busy professionals, university students and drivers on long journeys

editions.name: Energy Drink Sugarfree
editions.flavor_description: Wings without sugar: Red Bull Sugarfree is a Red Bull energy drink, but it contains no sugar

editions.name: The Summer Edition
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Summer Edition with a sudachi and lime taste, completed by a subtle Pomelo and citrus peel aroma

editions.name: The Apricot Edition
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Apricot Edition creates a perfect combination by mixing the notes of Apricot and Strawberry, with a hint of Peach taste
